response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across multiple domains, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or mobile platform experience — key requirements for this Engineering Productivity Manager role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack including mobile (iOS/Apple TV), build systems, and automation infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Lacks documented experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as a focus area
Resume emphasizes individual contribution over organizational change or roadmap ownership
